name: My Favorite Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup brown sugar, light or dark
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugars, butter, shortening, and salt.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Combine flour and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the creamed mixture; mix just until it starts to come together.
5. Combine pecan pieces, chocolate chunks, and chocolate chips.
6. Fold into the creamed mixture.
7. Using a large spoon, drop dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Press down the cookies.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes, or until golden brown. If using a dark cookie sheet, decrease heat by 15-20 degrees.
10. Do not overcook. Serve hot. Makes 35 (2 oz.) cookies.
